parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Troublemaker and states he switched James and Laura. However, Mitchell claims to be the Robber and says he stole from Laura (who claimed Seer), which would have made Laura the Robber. If Justin then switched James and Laura, James would have become the Robber, yet Justin explicitly tells Laura 'you're the robber,' creating a logical contradiction. This inconsistency, combined with his aggressive attempt to direct the vote, strongly suggests Justin is bluffing as the Werewolf.

If Justin then switched James and Laura, James would have become the Robber, yet Justin explicitly tells Laura 'you're the robber,' creating a logical contradiction. This inconsistency, combined with his aggressive attempt to direct the vote, strongly suggests Justin is bluffing as the Werewolf.
